groupings.title: Coding
groupings.description: The development loop — planning, TDD, debugging, review, release — plus language and infrastructure specialists. Partly adapted from Matt Pocock's skills.

groupings.title: Architecture
groupings.description: Design and understand the shape of a system: deep modules, domain language, and guided walkthroughs of unfamiliar code.

groupings.title: Diagrams
groupings.description: Turn systems and data into pictures — draw.io, Mermaid, and infographics.

groupings.title: Presentations
groupings.description: Build slide decks in Marp markdown or PowerPoint.

groupings.title: General
groupings.description: Interviewing, teaching, writing, and note-taking — skills for the work around the code.
